titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hammad Al-nawwa'

text: و ما كان فيه عن حمّاد النوّاء فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن خالد البرقيّ، عن محمّد بن‌ سنان، عن ابن مسكان، عن حمّاد النوّاء.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Hammad Al-Nawwa', I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Khalid Al-Barqi, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Hammad Al-Nawwa'.
